name: Carmit Candy Industries Ltd.
summary: Carmit Candy Industries Ltd. engages in the manufacture and supply of gluten free foods and confectionery products for food companies and retailers worldwide. Its products include gluten free candies and snacks, including clusters and wafers; dairy free and vegan chocolate bars, chocolate coins, and wafer fingers; and no added sugar wafers, clusters, and chocolate bars. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Rishon LeZion, Israel.
